description: Premium FiveM RP community site with modern, immersive, cinematic aesthetics.

layout_strategy.marketing: MODE A: 'Tetris' Grid. Generous spacing (p-12, p-16, gap-8). Asymmetry and overlapping elements. Direct children for grid items.
layout_strategy.dashboard: MODE B: 'Control Room' Grid. Strict hierarchy, dense spacing (p-4, p-6, gap-4). Every pixel utilized.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm z-50 sticky top-0.
surface_strategies.cards_marketing: Cardless or flat with 1px border-white/10. Avoid massive shadows. Hover: -translate-y-1 with subtle inner glow.
surface_strategies.admin_panels: Grid Borders: border-collapse style, 1px border-white/10 on right/bottom of grid items. Raw, technical look.

component_instructions.buttons: Primary: bg-[#E4B823] text-black hover:bg-[#FCD34D]. Secondary: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10. Include data-testid.
component_instructions.forms: Use customized Shadcn UI. Dark inputs, bg-transparent, border-white/10, focus:border-[#E4B823] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E4B823]/50.
component_instructions.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay over hero image: bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 via-black/50 to-transparent. Never blanket pure black/50.
component_instructions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for server stats. 'Editorial Ribbon' style: Pale/dark background with JetBrains Mono, huge gaps (gap-24).
component_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight for marketing, Regular for admin) or lucide-react.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly change state. e.g., hover:border-white/30 hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Use aria-hidden on decorative elements.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='hero-join-server').

images.description: Grand-Place Brussels at night, representing the Belgian aspect. Use with dark gradient overlay.
Police car at night for LSPD Bruxelles faction card.
Sports car on dark street for Civilian / Mechanic faction card.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required packages: yarn add framer-motion @phosphor-icons/react react-fast-marquee @studio-freight/react-lenis
Build the landing page in pure HTML/Tailwind with Framer Motion, avoiding rigid Shadcn cards for marketing sections.
Build the dashboard/admin panel using Shadcn components (customized for dark theme, 1px borders, no heavy shadows).
Use 'Outfit' for headings, 'Manrope' for body text, and 'JetBrains Mono' for stats. Add them to Google Fonts import in index.css.
Use Lenis for smooth scrolling on the marketing pages.
Implement language in French as requested: 'Rejoindre le serveur', 'Règlement', 'Panel Admin', 'Boutique VIP'.
DO NOT use placeholder image URLs. Use ONLY the provided media URLs.
Ensure the hero image has a proper gradient overlay so text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards.
Implement the 'Barely There' UI trend for the admin dashboard: monospaced data, dense grids, wireframe logic.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements.
